H2: Magnetic Business Card FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Magnetic Business Cards

Make Your Business Information Stick with Professional Magnetic Business Cards

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size: Choose your magnetic business card dimensions Quantity: Select the number of magnetic business cards needed Production Time: Select your turnaround preference Upload Design: Add your artwork or use our online designer Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Magnetic Business Cards for Your Brand

Transform your networking with custom magnetic business cards that ensure your contact information stays visible and accessible. Unlike traditional paper business cards that get lost or thrown away, magnetic business cards stick to refrigerators, filing cabinets, and metal surfaces, keeping your brand in front of customers every day. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Perfect for trade shows, networking events, job fairs, and direct mail campaigns, these durable marketing tools feature vibrant full-color printing on flexible magnetic material. Each magnetic business card includes a protective laminate finish that resists moisture and wear, ensuring your professional image remains crisp and clear.

Available in standard business card sizes or custom dimensions, magnetic business cards offer three finishing options: die-cut for unique shapes, square-cut with rounded corners for a professional appearance, or straight square-cut edges for a clean, modern look. Design your magnetic business cards using our intuitive online designer or upload your own print-ready artwork for complete customization.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Magnetic Business Cards

Ordering your magnetic business cards is simple and straightforward. Start by selecting your preferred size, quantity, and production timeline using our online configurator. You can either design your magnetic business cards from scratch using our user-friendly online designer or upload your own print-ready artwork file.

Design Process

Our online designer provides access to professional templates, clipart libraries, and text formatting tools specifically optimized for magnetic business card layouts. Simply upload your logo, add your contact information, and customize colors and fonts to match your brand identity. For customers uploading existing artwork, we recommend EPS or PDF files to ensure the highest print quality for your magnetic business cards.

Payment

All magnetic business card orders must be paid in full before production begins. We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards for immediate processing. Check payments are also accepted, though orders will not enter production until payment is received and processed.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your magnetic business card order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order's progress through every stage of production, from artwork approval to final delivery. Simply click the tracking link in your email for real-time updates on your magnetic business cards.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Business Card Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule accommodates urgent deadlines and standard timelines, giving you complete control over when your magnetic business cards are completed. Production time begins once artwork approval is confirmed and payment is processed. Note that total delivery time includes both production and shipping duration.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Perfect for tight deadlines and last-minute networking events. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available in special circumstances - contact our customer service team to discuss your magnetic business card requirements.

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal when you need magnetic business cards quickly but have slightly more flexibility than our priority option. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will start production the next business day. This timeline works well for trade shows and scheduled networking events.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option offers excellent speed at no additional cost. This timeline provides sufficient buffer for artwork revisions while ensuring your magnetic business cards arrive when needed. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose this economical option when your magnetic business cards aren't urgently needed. This extended timeline reduces production costs while maintaining our quality standards. Perfect for bulk orders and advance planning for upcoming marketing campaigns.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Magnetic Business Cards

Choose from three professional finishing options to customize the appearance and functionality of your magnetic business cards. All magnetic business cards include a protective laminate finish that resists moisture, scratches, and fading to ensure long-lasting durability.

Die Cut Magnetic Business Cards

Create unique shapes and contours that make your magnetic business cards stand out from standard rectangular formats. Die-cutting allows for custom shapes, rounded corners with specific radii, or cut-outs that highlight important information. This option requires vector artwork with clearly marked cut lines to ensure precise manufacturing.

Square Cut with Rounded Corners Magnetic Business Cards

Our standard finishing option provides a professional appearance with gently rounded corners that resist wear and prevent sharp edges. This classic finish works well for most business applications and provides a polished, professional look that complements any brand image.

Square Cut Magnetic Business Cards

Clean, straight edges create a modern, contemporary appearance perfect for businesses seeking a minimalist aesthetic. Square-cut magnetic business cards maximize the printable area and work especially well with geometric designs and bold graphics that extend to the edges.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Magnetic Business Cards

Proper artwork preparation ensures your magnetic business cards print with crisp text, vibrant colors, and precise registration. We accept various file formats, though vector-based files produce the highest quality results for magnetic business card printing.

Preferred File Types

Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) and Adobe PDF files provide optimal print quality for magnetic business cards. When submitting these formats, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues. Maximum file size is 100 MB to ensure efficient processing.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution JPEG, TIFF, and PNG files are acceptable for magnetic business card orders. These raster formats work best when created at full size with sufficient resolution: 300 DPI at actual size, 600 DPI at 50% scale, or 1200 DPI at 25% scale.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up your artwork at the exact dimensions of your magnetic business cards to ensure proper proportions. Convert all text to outlines to prevent font issues, and clearly indicate cut lines for die-cut options. Include bleed areas only when extending graphics to the edges, and never flatten layers in Photoshop files.

Design Services

If your existing artwork requires improvement for magnetic business card printing, our vectorizing and recreation services can help. Most logos and images can be recreated starting at $15, with complex designs quoted individually. This service must be paid in advance, and we'll keep your recreated artwork on file for future magnetic business card orders.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Business Card Shipping & Delivery

Your magnetic business cards will be carefully packaged and shipped via reliable carriers to ensure safe delivery. Shipping time is separate from production time, so factor both durations when planning your delivery requirements.

Shipping Methods

Standard shipping via UPS Ground or USPS typically delivers magnetic business cards within 2-4 business days after production completion. Expedited shipping options are available for faster delivery when your magnetic business cards are needed urgently. All orders include tracking information for delivery monitoring.

Shipping Time Expectations

Delivery timeframes depend on your location and selected shipping method. Most magnetic business card orders ship within the continental United States arrive within 2-4 business days via standard ground service. Custom car magnets and other magnetic products ship using the same reliable methods.

Important Shipping Notes

Magnetic business cards are packaged with protective backing to prevent accidental adhesion during transit. Orders shipping to metal structures or locations with strong magnetic fields should be handled carefully during unpacking. International shipping is available with extended delivery times and additional customs requirements.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installation & Application of Magnetic Business Cards

Magnetic business cards are designed for easy application and repositioning on compatible metal surfaces. Proper placement ensures maximum adhesion and longevity for your magnetic business cards.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the target metal surface with a dry cloth to remove dust, oil, and debris that could interfere with magnetic adhesion. Smooth, flat metal surfaces provide the strongest hold for magnetic business cards. Textured or painted metal surfaces may reduce magnetic strength.

Applying Magnetic Business Cards

Place your magnetic business card against the cleaned metal surface and press firmly to ensure full contact. The flexible magnetic material will conform to slight surface variations. Magnetic business cards can be repositioned multiple times without losing adhesive strength.

Compatible Surfaces

Magnetic business cards adhere best to ferrous metals including steel, iron, and magnetic stainless steel. They will not stick to aluminum, brass, copper, or non-magnetic stainless steel surfaces. Test adhesion on a small area before applying multiple magnetic business cards. Consider pairing with custom photo magnets for comprehensive magnetic marketing materials.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Magnetic Business Cards?

Magnetic business cards are flexible promotional materials printed on thin magnetic substrate with a protective laminate coating. Made from rubber magnetic material, these cards function like traditional business cards but stick to metal surfaces such as refrigerators, filing cabinets, and office equipment. They are commonly used for networking, trade shows, direct mail campaigns, and service reminders where long-term visibility is important. Unlike paper business cards, magnetic business cards remain visible for extended periods, providing ongoing brand exposure and contact information access.

Order Professional Magnetic Business Cards Today

Ready to make your business information stick? Design your custom magnetic business cards using our online designer or upload your own artwork to get started. With fast turnaround times, professional finishing options, and durable magnetic material, your magnetic business cards will keep your brand visible long after initial contact.

Choose from multiple sizes, quantities, and production timelines to meet your specific networking and marketing requirements. Our save the date magnets use similar magnetic technology for event announcements, while our full range of magnetic products provides comprehensive promotional solutions.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Business Card FAQs

What material are magnetic business cards made from?

Magnetic business cards are manufactured using flexible rubber magnetic material with full-color digital printing and a protective laminate finish. This construction provides durability, weather resistance, and strong magnetic adhesion to compatible metal surfaces.

What surfaces work best for magnetic business cards?

Magnetic business cards adhere strongly to ferrous metals including steel, iron, and some stainless steel surfaces. They work perfectly on refrigerators, filing cabinets, metal doors, and office equipment. They will not stick to aluminum, brass, copper, or non-magnetic materials.

What are the standard sizes for magnetic business cards?

Standard magnetic business card dimensions are 3.5" x 2" and 2" x 3.5" to match traditional business card proportions. Custom sizes are available to accommodate unique design requirements or specific magnetic business card applications.

How long do magnetic business cards last outdoors?

Magnetic business cards feature weather-resistant laminate coating that protects against moisture, UV rays, and temperature changes. With proper application on suitable metal surfaces, magnetic business cards typically maintain their appearance and magnetic strength for 2-3 years in outdoor conditions.

Can magnetic business cards be die-cut into custom shapes?

Yes, magnetic business cards can be die-cut into virtually any shape or configuration. Custom die-cutting requires vector artwork with clearly marked cut lines and may involve additional setup costs depending on complexity. Standard shapes and rounded corners are included at no extra charge.

What file format works best for magnetic business card artwork?

Adobe Illustrator EPS and PDF files produce the highest quality results for magnetic business card printing. High-resolution JPEG, TIFF, and PNG files are also acceptable. Convert all fonts to outlines and ensure artwork is created at actual size with 300 DPI resolution for optimal print quality.
